calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JEREMY S. GOLDEN of Golden & Cardona-Loya, LLP, Tel No. (619) 476-0030 appearing telephonically for the Defendant Lindsey M. Records;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LINDSEY RECORDS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Defandant Ms. Records must file her Answer within 10 days of notice of entry of the order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
